title: Maybellene
why_this_song: Maybellene by Chuck Berry (1955) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh, Maybellene, why can't you be true?
You just started doing the things you used to do
As I was motorvatin' over the hill
I saw Maybellene in a Coupé De Ville
Oh, Maybellene, why can't you be true?
You done started back doing the things you used to do

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "maybellene" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "maybellene" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: "Maybellene" was released in 1955. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Maybellene" foi lançada em 1955. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Maybellene" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Maybellene" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Chuck Berry one question about "Maybellene", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Chuck Berry sobre "Maybellene", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Maybellene" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Maybellene" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Maybellene" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Maybellene" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
